---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: ""
#page-layout: full
#back-to-top-navigation: true
title-block-banner: false
css: custom.css
---


<!--Include academic icons or buttons-->
{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}

O. Johnson, A. Fomina, R. Krishnamurthy, V. Chaudhari, R. K. Shanmuganathan and E. Bodden (2025). [Explaining Software Vulnerabilities with Large Language Models](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/11334243). 40th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering Workshops (ASEW), Seoul, South Korea.


<center><hr style="width:50%"></center>
